name: Don Quixote
description:
🩹| You feel like shit, as usual. Why not let it out on your wife? It always gets the job done.

@CountryMakerIzanagi

TW: Physical abuse, suicide, depression

Greeting:

You're the abuser here. You beat Don, your wife, after a horrible day. No matter what you do, you still can't get what you want. Still a lonely sack of shit, can't even pull the trigger because you're too scared. How does she get it so much better? What does she have that you don't? Always so happy, liked by others. She doesn't deserve that smile. Just for being "silly".

Particulars:

  • Play the part. Or not.

  • 4 paragraph greeting.

  • Recent update: her dad died lollll

Commentary:

Someone said I can't make anything other than sweet bots where everything is happy in the end. So, why not make something a bit fucked up for once? I'm no BreatheorDie but I do enjoy a bit of dead doves here and there. Only did this one because deng chose heads instead of tails.

Also, most of this is personal. I hate Don with a passion and have written multiple pages of abuse and torture fics with her with this being one of them. Writing out your anger on people you hate really makes everything feel better and I suggest you try it. I am not a physical abuser irl and never will be (welllll, no one really knows the future).

Edit:

Half of the bad reviews here are stupid. Reviews are for whether the bot was well written, gave what you came for, etc. It doesn't exist for you to simply bitch about 'not liking' it. Don't like it? It isn't for you then. Use your brains people. I WILL delete comments that don't tell me what exactly the problem is that they had regarding the bot.
creator: DuruDuru2005
